title: Proclamation No. 2053, s. 2010
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO.2053

PROPOSED PROCLAMATION CREATING AND DESIGNATING TWO (2) PARCELS OF LAND LOCATED AT BARANGAYS LUZ, MABOLO, HIPODROMO, KAMPUTHAW AND CARRETA, CEBU CITY, TO BE KNOWN AS CBP-IT PARK, AS AN INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 09-578 dated 18 November 2009 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, two (2) parcels of land located at Barangays Luz, Mabolo, Hipodromo, Kamputhaw and Carreta, Cebu City as Information Technology Park, to be known as CBP-IT Park, with an aggregate area of Four Hundred Ninety Seven Thousand One Hundred Fifty Five (497,155) square meters, more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

“Lot 644 Psd-07-033923 Mabolo, Cebu City Cebu Holdings, Inc.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 28 deg. 49′ E., 586.50 m. from Mon. No. 1, Banilad Estate.

thence N. 53 deg. 44′ W., 68.50 m. to point 2; thence N. 84 deg. 23′ W., 58.30 m. to point 3; thence S. 31 deg. 24′ W., 36.70 m. to point 4; thence S. 81 deg. 28′ W., 24.30 m. to point 5; thence S. 31 deg. 29′ W., 44.80 m. to point 6; thence N. 23 deg. 51′ W., 291.30 m. to point 7; thence N. 76 deg. 04′ E., 147.00 m. to point 8; thence S. 67 deg. 04′ E., 56.50 m. to point 9; thence S. 45 deg. 30′ E., 55.90 m. to point 10; thence S. 11 deg. 04′ E., 97.40 m. to point 11; thence S. 19 deg. 21′ E., 67.00 m. to point 12; thence S. 64 deg. 47′ E., 89.20 m. to point 13; thence S. 31 deg. 36′ E., 7.60 m. to point 14; thence S. 80 deg. 35′ W., 63.60 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of Fifty Thousand Five Hundred Thirteen (50,513) square meters, more or less . All corners of the perimeter boundary are Old PS cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm. All corners not otherwise described are PS cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm. Date Surveyed: June 5-10, 1995. Approved on 08 November 1995.

All corners not otherwise described are PS cyl. conc. mons. 15×60 cm. HLURB approval dated: February 9, 1990 and August 31, 1990. Approved on 07 September 1990.”

IN WITNESS THEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 4 th day of MAY, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) LEANDRO R. MENDOZA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
